2604.10549.title: Failure Ontology: A Lifelong Learning Framework for Blind Spot Detection and Resilience Design
2604.10549.paper_summary: Personalized learning systems are almost universally designed around a single objective: help people acquire knowledge and skills more efficiently. We argue this framing misses the more consequential problem. The most damaging failures in human life-financial ruin, health collapse, professional obsolescence-are rarely caused by insufficient knowledge acquisition. They arise from the systematic absence of entire conceptual territories from a person's cognitive map: domains they never thought to explore because, from within their existing worldview, those domains did not appear to exist or to matter. We call such absences Ontological Blind Spots and introduce Failure Ontology (F), a formal framework for detecting, classifying, and remediating them across a human lifetime. The framework introduces three original contributions: (1) a four-type taxonomy of blind spots distinguishing domain blindness, structural blindness, weight blindness, and temporal blindness; (2) five convergent failure patterns characterizing how blind spots interact with external disruption to produce catastrophic outcomes; and (3) the Failure Learning Efficiency Theorem, proving that failure-based learning achieves higher sample efficiency than success-based learning under bounded historical data. We illustrate the framework through historical case analysis of the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis and the 2008 subprime mortgage crisis, and through alongitudinal individual case study spanning five life stages.
2604.10549.paper_summary_zh: 個性化學習系統幾乎普遍圍繞著一個單一目標設計：幫助人們更有效地獲取知識和技能。<lb/>我們認為這種框架忽略了更具影響力的問題。<lb/>人類生活中最具破壞性的失敗——財務破產、健康崩潰、職業過時——很少是由於知識獲取不足所造成的。<lb/>它們源於一個人的認知地圖中整個概念領域的系統性缺失：這些領域他們從未想到去探索，因為在他們現有的世界觀中，這些領域似乎不存在或不重要。<lb/>我們稱這種缺失為本體盲點，並引入失敗本體論（F），這是一個用於檢測、分類和修正這些盲點的正式框架，涵蓋整個人類生命週期。<lb/>該框架提出了三個原創貢獻：（1）一個四類型的盲點分類法，區分領域盲點、結構盲點、權重盲點和時間盲點；<lb/>（2）五種趨同的失敗模式，描述盲點如何與外部干擾互動以產生災難性結果；<lb/>（3）失敗學習效率定理，證明基於失敗的學習在有限的歷史數據下實現了比基於成功的學習更高的樣本效率。<lb/>我們通過對1997年亞洲金融危機和2008年次貸危機的歷史案例分析，以及通過一個涵蓋五個生命階段的縱向個案研究來說明該框架。
2604.10549.author: Yuan Sun et.al.
2604.10549.authors: Yuan Sun, Hong Yi, Jinyuan Liu
